# Burundi Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Burundi's administrative hierarchy:
> 18 provinces, 119 communes, 2,917 collines.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total provinces: 18
- Total communes: 119
- Total collines: 2,917
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-05-26
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All provinces (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-province.json)
- [All communes (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-commune.json)
- [All collines (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-colline.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by Province

- [Bubanza](https://github.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/bubanza-bdi001/) — 5 communes, 88 collines
- [Bujumbura Mairie](https://github.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/bujumbura-mairie-bdi017/) — 3 communes, 103 collines
- [Bujumbura Rural](https://github.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/bujumbura-rural-bdi002/) — 9 communes, 160 collines
- [Bururi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/bururi-bdi003/) — 6 communes, 130 collines
- [Cankuzo](https://github.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/cankuzo-bdi004/) — 5 communes, 87 collines
- [Cibitoke](https://github.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/cibitoke-bdi005/) — 6 communes, 129 collines
- [Gitega](https://github.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/gitega-bdi006/) — 11 communes, 268 collines
- [Karuzi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/karuzi-bdi007/) — 7 communes, 146 collines
- [Kayanza](https://github.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/kayanza-bdi008/) — 9 communes, 301 collines
- [Kirundo](https://github.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/kirundo-bdi009/) — 7 communes, 198 collines
- [Makamba](https://github.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/makamba-bdi010/) — 6 communes, 142 collines
- [Muramvya](https://github.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/muramvya-bdi011/) — 5 communes, 100 collines
- [Muyinga](https://github.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/muyinga-bdi012/) — 7 communes, 230 collines
- [Mwaro](https://github.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/mwaro-bdi013/) — 6 communes, 134 collines
- [Ngozi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/ngozi-bdi014/) — 9 communes, 305 collines
- [Rumonge](https://github.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/rumonge-bdi018/) — 5 communes, 108 collines
- [Rutana](https://github.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/rutana-bdi015/) — 6 communes, 148 collines
- [Ruyigi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/ruyigi-bdi016/) — 7 communes, 140 collines

- [Kayanza](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/kayanza-bdi008.txt)
- [Kirundo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/kirundo-bdi009.txt)
- [Makamba](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/makamba-bdi010.txt)
- [Muramvya](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/muramvya-bdi011.txt)
- [Muyinga](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/muyinga-bdi012.txt)

- [Ngozi](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/ngozi-bdi014.txt)
- [Rumonge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/rumonge-bdi018.txt)
- [Rutana](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/rutana-bdi015.txt)
- [Ruyigi](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/ruyigi-bdi016.txt)

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (province), 2 (commune), 3 (colline)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Burundi Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/burundi-administrative-divisions
